prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: Blades in the Dark / Doskvol inspired industrial gothic supernatural atlas for the terrain type continent_archipelago.
Scene/backdrop: one dominant industrial gothic continent with a large uneven offshore archipelago in the Void Sea, canal districts, lightning rail lines, leaky industrial waterways, gang territory borders, deathlands beyond city walls, ghost-lit sectors, electroplasmic lightning towers, smoggy factories, leviathan hunter ports and occult island hideouts.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated dark gaslamp atlas, soot-stained parchment, gothic industrial zones, criminal faction territories, flickering gas lamps, smog and fog, electroplasmic blue lightning, supernatural darkness.
Composition/framing: tall portrait map; main continent off-center with an irregular archipelago sweeping along the coast in a diagonal arc; islands include tiny smuggler islets, refinery rocks, reef belts, large factory islands, crescent chains, ghost-haunted atolls and leviathan docks; include iron compass rose, gothic border, canal routes, rail routes, gang boundary shading, lightning tower icons and ghost marks without readable text.
Geography constraints: islands must be irregularly distributed and varied in size and shape, with channels, black lagoons, reefs, industrial ports, atolls, haunted rocks and broken shores; continental coastline should include peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, curved coasts, oily deltas, fjords, capes, polluted estuaries and fragmented cliffs; show walled cities, canal deltas, industrial marshes, dark forests, barren deathlands, cold highlands and haunted harbors.
Avoid: uniform island grid, bright heroic fantasy, clean steampunk optimism, simple round islands, modern satellite image, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
